title: chore(deps): update dependency rollup to v1.17.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [rollup](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup) | devDependencies | minor | [`1.16.7` -> `1.17.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/rollup/1.16.7/1.17.0) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rollup/rollup</summary>

### [`v1.17.0`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1170)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.16.7...v1.17.0)

_2019-07-15_

##### Features

-   Allow plugins to access current combined sourcemap in transform hook for coverage instrumentation ([#​2993](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2993))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2987](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2987): Fix code fences for link ([@​johanholmerin](https://togithub.com/johanholmerin))
-   [#​2989](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2989): Bump lodash from 4.17.11 to 4.17.14 ([@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot))
-   [#​2993](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2993): Add getCombinedSourceMap in transform plugin context ([@​billowz](https://togithub.com/billowz))

</details>
